mechanics.excerpt: Mandatory subpaths such as military Advanced Individual Training (AIT) and University Majors are not considered separate paths purposes ofthis rule_ However; elective subpaths such as military Special Training and University Schools are con- sidered separate. path'$ status is unclear; the gamemaster decides whether specific subpath counts mandatory elective based on the path and character in question; character can exceed the given limit with the gamemas ter'$ permission, but the gamemaster should keep in mind that longer career will result in more skilled (though older) char acter.
